title: Separator UI Component
content:
The `Separator` component provides a visual divider between content elements. It's built using `@radix-ui/react-separator` and integrates with the application's styling utilities. ## Key Exports * `Separator`: The main React component for rendering a separator. ## Props The `Separator` component accepts the following props: * `className` (string): Allows for custom styling of the separator. * `orientation` (enum: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'): Determines the orientation of the separator. Defaults to 'horizontal'. * `decorative` (boolean): Indicates whether the separator is purely decorative and should be ignored by assistive technologies. Defaults to `true`. * `...props`: Any additional props accepted by `@radix-ui/react-separator`'s `Root` component. ## Usage Example ```tsx import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"; function MyComponent() { return (

Content above separator

Content below separator

Vertical content 1 Vertical content 2
); } ```
